candidates.why: Top-line operating revenues; matches total revenue figures and represents primary revenue measure.
Explicit total revenue line identical to Operating revenues; also valid but slightly more generic label.
This is a cost line (COGS), not revenue; should not be used for REVT.
Liability account, not a revenue flow; excluded.
Tax liability, not revenue.

variables.notes: Operating revenues is the primary top-line revenue; identical to Total Revenue but more descriptive of core operations.

candidates.why: Major direct production cost component but not the full COGS bucket when a more explicit COGS line exists.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Explicit COGS label but missing in some years; still a strong candidate.
Adjustment component, not the main COGS measure.
Explicit consolidated COGS line matching raw materials; best single representation of cost of sales.
Inventory asset, not expense; excluded.

variables.notes: Chosen as the explicit consolidated COGS line; more complete than the raw materials component alone.

candidates.why: Operating overhead bucket consistent with SG&A; not marked as a total.
Share-based comp is an SG&A-type overhead cost; appropriate SG&A component.

variables.notes: Both rows represent SG&A-type overhead and are not totals or COGS/D&A/impairments.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Amortization portion of R&D, not total R&D expense.
Supplemental disclosure, not the primary accounting expense line.
Primary income statement R&D expense line; best match for R&D expense.
Capitalized R&D asset, not period expense.
Appears to be a constructed total combining components; less direct than the main expense line.
Balance sheet adjustment, not expense.

variables.notes: Uses the explicit income statement R&D expense line as XRD.

candidates.why: Core interest expense line; best measure of interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities only; component of total interest, not the main measure.
Represents profit attributable to minority shareholders, not interest expense.
Same as above; not interest.
Equity interest line, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; not the primary total interest line.
Debt stock, not expense.
Debt stock, not expense.
Debt stock, not expense.
Equity attributable to minority holders; not an interest expense.
Same as above; not interest expense.

variables.notes: Selects the main Interest Expense line as XINT; lease interest is a component and not used separately.

candidates.why: Equity attributable to parent shareholders only; excludes non-controlling interests.
Represents total shareholders' equity including non-controlling interests; best proxy for book equity.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing row, not the equity account itself.
Represents total assets or liabilities+equity, not equity alone.

variables.notes: Uses Total equity as book equity; MIB is captured separately from specific NCI rows.

candidates.why: P&L allocation of earnings to minorities; a flow, not the equity stock.
Duplicate of the above in P&L; also a flow.
P&L comprehensive income allocation; still a flow.
Balance sheet stock of minority equity; best measure for MIB.
Alternate label for NCI on balance sheet; also valid but redundant with the other NCI line.

variables.notes: Chooses the balance sheet Non-controlling interest as the minority interest (MIB) stock measure.
